creator: ernst@heinz.jollem.com
text:
Well, I got it to run, by just modifying the XF86Config file and removing the 
reference to the module 'Xft'. It seems that's causing all these unresolved 
symbol errors. Weerd.

By default xf86config includes this line in the XF86Config file. Should we 
add some documentation on this somewhere? Or do most people use a different 
config tool for XFree86-4 ?

--
Ernst
